case_title: ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS BURLESON KERMIT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BURLESON KERMIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
UNABLE TO SERVE KERMIT BURLESON FOR 8-7-92 HRG.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURLESON KERMIT $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
